name: Agnes de Mille
abstract: Agnes George de Mille (September 18, 1905 – October 7, 1993) was an American dancer and choreographer.

about_quotes.speaker: Ted Piltzecker
about_quotes.evidence: the great choreographer Agnes DeMille said when there’s a pattern there’s an expectation.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ted Piltzecker interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 10, 2019
